response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software engineering with a strong focus on innovation and leadership, including entrepreneurial roles and contributions to AI-agent infrastructure. However, his experience in AI-specific domains is limited (mostly through AI-agent tools and workshops), and his tenure in Director-level roles is not clearly demonstrated. His technical versatility is a strength, but the lack of deep AI/ML expertise or cloud platform strategy experience may be a mismatch for the role's core requirements.
strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience with diverse tech stacks, including cloud and AI-agent infrastructure
Entrepreneurial experience (Northwind Labs, GISCollective) demonstrating innovation and ownership
Strong technical leadership in open-source projects and community contributions (talks, workshops, and libraries)
concerns: Limited direct AI/ML expertise or AI-powered product development experience
No clear evidence of Director-level or strategic cloud/AI platform leadership roles
Most recent AI-related work (MCP, AI-agent infrastructure) is tangential to core AI strategy requirements

key_factors.factor: AI expertise and AI-powered product development
